About Ascend

A Space Built for Your Ambition

Ascend Business Suites provides fully private, move-in ready offices for professionals who mean business. Whether you're scaling a startup, running a boutique salon, or building a client-facing practice — we have the right space to help you rise.

Fully private, lockable suites — your space, your brand
Private bathroom in every suite — no sharing, fully yours
Flexible lease terms built for growing businesses
Community of driven professionals under one roof
Our Spaces

Suite Options

Six fully private suites across two floors — each with its own private bathroom, included parking, and everything you need to hit the ground running.

◈

First Floor

Three ground-level suites — 100, 102, and 104 — each with a private bathroom and direct entry. Ideal for client-facing businesses that need easy access.

Suites 100 · 102 · 104
◉

Second Floor

Three upper-level suites — 200, 202, and 204 — each with a private bathroom. A quieter, more elevated setting for focused professional work.

Suites 200 · 202 · 204
◎

Every Suite Includes

Private lockable entry, your own dedicated bathroom, high-speed internet, all utilities, and 24/7 secure building access — all in one monthly rate.

A Professional Address That Works As Hard As You Do

When you join Ascend Business Suites, you're not just renting a room — you're establishing your brand in a premium professional environment. Impress clients from the moment they walk through the door.

All utilities, parking, and your own private bathroom included. No hidden fees. Just show up and do your best work.

Pricing

No surprise bills. Everything you need to run your business is included in one simple monthly rate.
